name: requires_15_years_experience
description: Requires 15+ years PM experience — exceeds Aakash's 10yr. Should be flagged as red flag.

job.title: Director of Product Management
job.full_description: Oracle is seeking a Director of Product Management for our cloud infrastructure division. This role requires a minimum of 15 years of product management experience, with at least 5 years in a director-level role. You must have managed large product portfolios with 20+ engineers. Deep enterprise software domain expertise essential. Must have led products generating $100M+ ARR. Experience managing distributed global teams of 50+ required.
